title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 446.070 - Adjournment
text:
446.070.  Adjournment. — Such judge shall have power to adjourn from day to day, when the same may be necessary to the accomplishment of the examination.
(RSMo 1939 § 1977, A. 1949 S.B. 1126, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1813; 1919 § 5500; 1909 § 6443 
Effective 1-02-79
